title: Customize Auto Number with # of digits and starting #
excerpt: The Auto Number column is great, but I’d like to be able to customize it to always be 4 digits and start at a particular number (as an example) This would help with tracking projects by Job # and transition away from a p…

posts.author: setsteve (Seth)
posts.cookedHtml: The Auto Number column is great, but I’d like to be able to customize it to always be 4 digits and start at a particular number (as an example) This would help with tracking projects by Job # and transition away from a previous system.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @setsteve

Welcome to the community! Did you realize that the AutoNumber column is renumbered every time you change the order of the items (Job # in your case)? To generate an auto generated id (with preText) that “sticks” to the item I recommend the AutoID Column app to be found here: https://monday.com/marketplace/17

posts.author: setsteve (Seth)
posts.cookedHtml: Ooooookay great point. In that case it would be amazing to customize the Item ID column to be 4-5 digits so it’s not overwhelming for putting into file names related to the project.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
setsteve:

to customize the Item ID column to be 4-5 digits

That all (and more) can be done with the AutoID Column app, 10-day free trial

posts.author: AmitShemla (Amit Shemla)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, the only option I see is minimum digits, but I want to limit it to a maximum of 6 — is there a way to do that?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: The minimum nr of digits adds 0’s to the front of the numeric part. If you specify 6, you will be good until you reach 1.000.000 items.
